case_title: FRAPEZ LLC VS. PAYMENT SYSTEMS CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-31-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFECTIVE POS ON DEFENDANT PAYMENT STYSTEMS CORP. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE BOTH DEFENDANTS IF THERE IS A FUTURE HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
